interval.description: Zero means to inherit. Durations are expressed as integer nanoseconds.

mode.description:
Test is the test to perform to check that the container is healthy.
An empty slice means to inherit the default.
The options are:
{} : inherit healthcheck
{"NONE"} : disable healthcheck
{"CMD", args...} : exec arguments directly
{"CMD-SHELL", command} : run command with system's default shell

retries.description:
Retries is the number of consecutive failures needed to consider a container as unhealthy.
Zero means inherit.

accessLinks.description: AccessLinks external links to access the app

stats.description: Stats of app, only returns when req.getStats=true

cronExpr.description: cronExpr and interval are mutually exclusive
cronExpr and interval are mutually exclusive

password.description: Required when security option is password-2fa/password-only
